name: East Indian Shrimp in a Tandoori Marinade
recipeInstructions:
1. Thread shrimp onto 8 skewers and lay them on a jelly roll pan or any pan that can hold them in one layer.
2. Marinate the shrimp: In a small bowl, mix all ingredients well. Spoon over the skewered shrimp and cover completely. Slip into a plastic bag and refrigerate for at least 6 hours.
3. Grill the shrimp: Grill the skewered shrimp over hot coals for 3-4 minutes. Turn and continue cooking for another 3 minutes until done. Serve immediately with lemon wedges and onion slices.
